titleStmt.title: SII 18.142: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 142. (B.K. No. 82 of 1932-33.) HĀVĒRI, HAVERI TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT.

p.hi: Slab in the temple of Purada Siddhēśvara.

summary.p: This inscription, the latter portion of which is badly damaged, refers itself to the reign of Sarvajña-chakravarti Bhūlōkamalladēva and records a certain grant probably made to the god Siddhēs11varadēva. The details of the grant are lost.

Pergaḍe Nāgadēva and Duggarāja are stated to be in charge of the perjuṅka, vaḍḍarāvuḷa and bilkoḍe taxes, under Tailapa of the Kadamba family who was governing Vanavase Twelve-thousand, Sāntaḷige Thousand, and Pānuṁgal Five-hundred. Nāgadēva is called the Mahāmātya of Tailapa.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgaśiraścuṁbicandracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁbhamūlastaṁbhāya śaṁ
bhavē . © śrīmatparvvataputrikāpriyatamaṁ dēvēndrabṛndānatōdbhāmāḷam kṛtapādapadma
yugaḷaṁ kāruṇyadiṁ pāvarīgrāmādhīśacatuśśatōttamadharādēvargga bhīṣṭhārtthamam sōmō
dgranthananindyanīge padepiṁ siddhēśvaran śāśvataṁ . suradanujamanujavidyādharakinnara pūjitānghṛ
yugaḷaṁ nānnūrvvarige padepindamindrēśvaradēvan kuḍuge sakaḷasukhasampadamaṁ .
śrīmaccaḷukyavamśalalāmaṁ sōmēśvaran dharēśvaranadaṭindī mahiyaṁ vijayabhuja
śrīmaṇḍanamāge tāḷdidaṁ nṛpatiḷakaṁ . svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīpṛ
thvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷatiḷaka cā
ḷukyābharaṇam śrīmatsarvvajñacakravartti bhūlōkamalladēvara vijayarājya muttarō
ttarābhivṛddhipravarddhamānamācandrārkkatārambaraṁ saluttamire . tatpādapadmō pajīvi .
vṛtta . haradharaṇīprasūtakuḷamaṇḍananuddhatavīravairikēsari narapāḷajāḷakaśirōma
ṇi vānararājacihnabandhuravividhadhvajōjvaḷakadambakuḷābharaṇaṁ jayāṁganāvaranesedam sama
stadhare baṇnise tailahadēvabhūbhujaṁ . svasti samadhigatapancamahāśabda mahā maṇḍaḷēśva
raṁ banavāsipuravarādhīśvara jayantīmadhukēśvaradēvalabdhavaraprasādam sahajamṛgamadāmō
daṁ tryakṣakṣmāsambhavaṁ caturāśītinagarādhiṣṭhitalalāṭalōcanacaturbbhujaṁ jagadviditā ṣṭādaśā
śvamēdhayajñadīkṣādīkṣitaṁ himavadgirīndrarundraśikharisamsthāpitasphaṭikaśilāstambhaba
ddhamadagajamahāmahimābhirāmaṁ kadambacakrimayūravarmmamahāmahīpāḷakuḷabhū
ṣaṇaṁ permmaṭṭitūryyanirgghōṣaṇaṁ śākhācarēṁdradhvajavirājamānamānōttuṁga siṁha
lāncchanaṁ dattārtthikāncanaṁ samarajayakāraṇaṁ kadambarābharaṇaṁ mārkkoḷvara gaṇḍam pratāpamārttaṇḍam
śrīmattribhuvanamalladēvapādārādhakaṁ parabaḷasādhakaṁ nāmādisamastapraśastisahitam śrīma
ttailahadēvarasarvvanavase pannircchāsiramumaṁ sāntaḷige sāyiramumaṁ pānum gallaynūṟu
maṁ tribhōgābhyantarasiddhiyināḷdarasugeyyuttamire . © vṛtta © baḷavattailapadēva bhūpana mahā
mātyōttamaṁ sadguṇākaḷitaṁ perggaḍe nāgadēvavibhu tatsunkādhipō cāgi nirmmaḷa cittam vibhu duggarā
janumivarddharmmajñarātmīyakīrttilatāvēṣṭitadignikāyaresedarvviśvambharācakradoḷu . kanda . © Avarim
baḷikaṁ vidyāpravaraṁ vibhukēsirājanuṁ sakaḷaguṇōdbhavanenipa sunkaverggaḍe bhuvana prakhyāta kētanāya
kanumesedar . © svasti samastapraśastisahitaṁ śrīmatperggaḍe nāgadēvayya nāyakanum duggarājanum .
śrīmattailapadēvarasara besadiṁ banavasenāḍa perjjunka vaḍḍarāvuḷaṁ bilkoḍe yendintivam tribhōgābhyantarasiddhi
yindāḷdanubhavisuttamire . vṛtta . Amitadvīpābdhivēḷāvaḷayitadharaṇībhāgadoḷu kuntaḷam viśvamahī
samsēvyamā kuntaḷavasudhegaḷankāramī tenkanāḍalli manōjñakhyātamavyāhata
menisi sarassēvyanīrējanānākamanīyōdyānadiṁ pāvariyesegumiḷā
dēvatāramyaharmyaṁ . Ā grāmada pūrvva dakṣiṇa
digbhāgadoḷ . vṛttaṁ . baravaṁ nālnū
rvvarurvvyāmara kuḍu
ddhēśvaradē
kaṇa
rōtta
dhipanni
tāraṁ naḍevante
prasaṁga
siri
de
śvara
ccāḷu
muttarā saṁkrama
svādhyāyadhyānadhāraṇamōnānuṣṭhānaparāya
raprasannaruṁ . yajanayājanādhyayanā
taṣaṭkarmmanirataruṁ manumunīṁdraca
ṣṭādaśasmṛtipurāṇānēkadharmmaśāstra
bara śaraṇāgatavajrapaṁjararu
ru saptasōmasaṁsthāvabh®
ruṁ sarvva viśiṣṭajana
śrīmatsiddhēśvaradēvaśrīpādapadmārā
śrīmadagrahāraṁ pāvariya nā
pūrvvakaṁ māḍi biṭṭarintī dharmma
ḍegaḷuṁ pratipāḷisuva
ḷida paṁcamahāpātakanakkuṁ
rēti vasundharā ṣaṣṭhirvvarṣasaha
Digital edition of SII 18.142 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
